name: Shaanxi Jinye Science Technology and Education Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Shaanxi Jinye Science Technology and Education Group Co.,Ltd engages in the packaging and decorating printing businesses primarily in China. The company researches, designs, development, and produces cigarette labels, color packaging boxes, color prints, and other products; and cigarette gift boxes, wine labels, medicine and wine boxes, and other packaging and decorating printing products. In addition, it offers education and investment consulting, business management education, and cultural and educational exchange services; and online education, open classes, skills training, and other education and teaching services. Further, it operates Mingde College of Northwestern Polytechnical University, a full-time undergraduate college; and develops and operates real estate projects. Shaanxi Jinye Science Technology and Education Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1992 and is based in Xi'an, China.
